title: ludwigia longifolia
intro: Ludwigia longifolia, also known as Water Willow or Long-Leaf Water Willow, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the evening primrose family (Onagraceae). This aquatic plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Ludwigia longifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate coughs and colds, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ludwigia longifolia is commonly prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
